signals.headline: HEADLINE | South Korea holds interest rates at 2
signals.raw:
HEADLINE | South Korea holds interest rates at 2.5% amid inflation above target | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Bank of Korea's Monetary Policy Board announced on April 10, 2026, that it maintained its benchmark interest rate at 2.5% for the 7th consecutive month.[6] This decision came as **consumer prices climbed above the central bank's 2% target**, with inflation recently at approximately 2.2%.[

signals.headline: Elon Musk Named in New Epstein Files During Kash Patel Senate Testimony, No Trip Confirmation | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Named in New Epstein Files During Kash Patel Senate Testimony, No Trip Confirmation | NO | HIGH confidence**  
A six-page document released by Democratic lawmakers lists Elon Musk on a tentative December 6, 2014, itinerary to Epstein's island, with a note questioning if it was still happening; no evidence confirms the trip occurred, and no charges exist.[1]

House Passes SAVE America Act on Party-Line Vote Amid Musk/Trump Pressure, Senate Path Blocked | NO | MED confidence**  
The GOP-led House approved the voter registration overhaul (218-213) on February 11, 2026, after pushes from Trump and Musk, but Senate Republicans lack votes to overcome a Democratic filibuster; Sen. Lisa Murkowski opposes it as overreach.[2]

signals.headline: **Currency weakness:** The Korean won has weakened significantly to around 1,520 won per U
signals.raw: **Currency weakness:** The Korean won has weakened significantly to around 1,520 won per U.S. dollar, complicating inflation management.[6]

**Growth concerns:** Anticipated economic growth is expected to fall below 2% this year.[6]
